test_cases.name: health_check_success
test_cases.description: Verify health check endpoint returns 200 with ok status

test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year

test_cases.description: Create author with only required name field

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create author without name field returns validation error

test_cases.description: List authors with default skip and limit parameters

test_cases.name: list_authors_custom_pagination
test_cases.description: List authors with custom skip and limit values

test_cases.description: Retrieve author details by ID and verify ETag header is present

test_cases.description: Request author with If-None-Match header matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_etag
test_cases.description: Update author with matching If-Match ETag header

test_cases.name: update_author_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Update author with mismatched If-Match ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Delete author that has no associated books

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete author with associated books returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.description: Create category with unique name

test_cases.name: create_category_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create category with duplicate name returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: list_categories
test_cases.description: Retrieve list of all categories

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Create book with all required fields and valid author and category

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Attempt to create book with duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Create book with ISBN outside 10-13 character range returns 422

test_cases.name: create_book_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Create book with non-existent author_id returns 404

test_cases.name: list_books_default_pagination
test_cases.description: List books with default page and page_size

test_cases.name: list_books_with_search_filter
test_cases.description: List books filtered by search term in title or ISBN

test_cases.name: list_books_with_price_range
test_cases.description: List books filtered by min_price and max_price

test_cases.name: get_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Retrieve book details by ID with author and category relations

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Soft delete book sets is_deleted flag without physical removal

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore previously soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to restore book that is not deleted returns 400
